source.name: art
source.instructions: In this project, you selected images files and added them to a game project.  Thinking about the context from the video, how will you choose to source or create art for your future game projects?
source.command: python3 .guides/secure/freetext.py --question 'In this project, you selected images files and added them to a game project.  Thinking about the context from the video, how will you choose to source or create art for your future game projects?' --use-llm
